avatar.label: The style-forward self-purchaser who wants one memorable piece
avatar.purchase_moment: Getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit

pains.text: Easy outfits can feel forgettable, while adding more pieces can make them feel busy.
Trouser sizing and length can stop a confident purchase decision.

desires.text: She wants trousers distinctive enough to lead the whole look.
She wants to see the offer and know immediately how to get the pair.

objections.text: She needs the size range, length, and care requirements before deciding.

language_cues.text: Please send me a link to buy a pair.
How do I buy a pair.

copy.announcement: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.eyebrow: One finishing touch. One unforgettable statement piece.
copy.headline: When You Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume Today, You Get the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.subheadline: Let cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, a braided drawcord, and fringed hems carry the outfit while everything else stays simple.
copy.story_heading: The trousers that do the visual work
copy.story_intro: Start with a simple top. Let the colour, texture, and relaxed silhouette become the point of the outfit.

story.heading: When simple starts to feel forgettable
story.body: You know the moment: a casual plan is coming up, your reliable basics are ready, but the outfit still needs one detail that feels unmistakably yours.

story.heading: Make one piece the whole point
story.body: When one piece carries the colour, texture, and silhouette, you can keep the rest of your outfit clean and still look deliberately styled.

story.heading: Colour and texture, already built in
story.body: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems. Pair them with a fitted tee, knit, or sweater and let those details lead.

story.heading: A closer look at the statement
story.body: Cream tweed gives the pair its soft base. Multicoloured flecks add the visual spark, while the braided drawcord and fringed hems finish the design.

story.heading: Built for the plan already in your calendar
story.body: Wear them when a coffee turns into a long city walk, when a casual evening deserves more personality, or when you want your trousers to carry an otherwise simple look.

story.heading: The silhouette is part of the design
story.body: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist. The shape is intentional, and the waist lets you adjust how the pair sits.

story.heading: More style without more competing pieces
story.body: You do not need to stack prints, layers, and accessories. Choose a simple top, add your usual shoes, and let the trousers be the memorable part.

story.heading: Choose with the measurements in front of you
story.body: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

story.heading: Treat the tweed like the statement fabric it is
story.body: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it. Know the care before first wear and keep the textured finish looking considered.

story.heading: Two parts of one getting-ready moment
story.body: Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume is the paid finishing touch. The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE statement piece that shapes the outfit.

story.heading: The complete offer, clearly stated
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE. Ships within 4 days, with 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

story.heading: One pair, three easy moments
story.body: Lead with them for a casual social plan, style them with a fitted top or sweater for a weekend city outing, or use their texture and colour for a creative evening look.

story.heading: Three steps before you head out
story.body: Choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44. Adjust the elastic waist for the relaxed baggy fit. Dry clean only and avoid rough surfaces that may snag the tweed.

story.heading: Finish the look with the complete offer
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and claim the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE in the same offer.

copy.offer_heading: Get the finishing touch. Receive the statement piece FREE.
copy.offer_body: Your offer includes Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume as the paid product and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants as the FREE companion. The design-led trousers bring the colour, texture, and relaxed shape to your outfit.
copy.final_body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.faq_heading: Your pants and offer questions, answered

proof_sections.social_heading: Start simple and let the trousers lead
proof_sections.recognition_heading: For days when basics need one memorable piece
proof_sections.recognition_body: See how a statement trouser can shape casual plans, city outings, and creative evenings without crowding the rest of the look.
proof_sections.compliments_heading: Cream tweed, colour flecks, drawcord, and fringe
proof_sections.wall_kicker: More ways to wear the idea
proof_sections.wall_heading: See the statement piece through different eyes
proof_sections.wall_body: Different people, settings, and styling moments show how one distinctive pair can become the centre of a simple outfit.

sample_stories.name: Maya R.
sample_stories.headline: The outfit finally had a point
sample_stories.review_text: I kept the top simple and let the flecked tweed carry the look. That was exactly the balance I wanted for a casual night out.
sample_stories.context: getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit
sample_stories.outcome: A simple outfit centred on one statement piece

sample_stories.name: Sofia L.
sample_stories.headline: Easy for a city Saturday
sample_stories.review_text: I pictured these with a fitted navy top and my everyday shoes. The texture gives the outfit enough interest without asking for extra layers.
sample_stories.context: weekend city outings styled with a simple fitted top or sweater
sample_stories.outcome: A practical weekend styling direction

sample_stories.name: Elena M.
sample_stories.headline: Less busy than I expected
sample_stories.review_text: I usually hesitate around colourful pieces, but the cream base makes the flecks easier to style. I would keep everything else quiet.
sample_stories.context: casual evenings and creative social settings where texture and colour can lead the look
sample_stories.outcome: A calmer way to wear a colourful statement
